'''Berec Tanaal''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer stationed at [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. He was a specialist in hunting. He escaped from [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] in the [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Bright Hope/Legends|''Bright Hope'']].

{{Char-stub}}
